name: NACA full-scale propeller compressibility survey
note: NTRS abstract: effects on efficiency begin at tip speeds from about 0.5 to 0.7 times sound speed for take-off/climb blade-angle range.

name: NACA 4(3)(08)-045 two-blade high-speed propeller
note: NTRS abstract: serious efficiency losses as tip Mach exceeded about 0.91; slope from 9 to 22 percent per 0.1 Mach depending on advance-diameter ratio.
